allow: Bash(node -e "const m = require\('@ant-design/icons-vue'\); const names = Object.keys\(m\).filter\(n => n.includes\('Outlined'\)\).sort\(\); console.log\(names.join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const m = require\('@ant-design/icons-vue'\); console.log\('AimOutlined' in m, 'SendOutlined' in m, 'AtSignOutlined' in m\)")
Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@ant-design/icons-vue'\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.match\(/At|User|Mail|Send/i\)\); console.log\(names.join\('\\n'\)\)")
